## IMQ\_LOG\_TIME variable

Environment variable IMQ\_LOG\_TIME=\[1, 0\] - enables/disables profiled timings logging

 {<!-- -->boolean<!-- -->}

**Signature:**

```typescript
IMQ_LOG_TIME: boolean
```
